## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests locally.
- [ ] I updated or added tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I verified linting and formatting for the touched files.
- [ ] I checked the repository quality gates and CI-sensitive workflows.
- [ ] I updated docs or track artifacts if the change affects workflow or governance.
- [ ] I used a conventional commit message.

## Validation

List the commands you ran and the outcome.

## Notes

Call out any follow-up work or known limitations.
